summary: PR #2543 decompiled the castle-stage function grCastle_801CE19C by replacing small inline assembly and byte-mask flag handling with C that uses a newly modeled grCastle_GroundVars9 bitfield. The diff also updated nearby castle flag writes to use xDE_b0 and adjusted narrow PAD_STACK usage. Reviewer feedback stated that the struct needed to be modified to use a bitfield.

key_files.role: Replaced grCastle_801CE19C inline assembly and raw xDE flag checks/writes with typed bitfield access; updated related castle functions to use xDE_b0; adjusted PAD_STACK usage.
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: src/melee/gr/grcastle.c added 9 deleted 35 hunks 6
raw_diff: grCastle_801CE19C hunk replaces xDE >> 7 and rlwimi clear with gp->gv.castle9.xDE_b0
raw_diff: grCastle_801CDFD8 and grCastle_801CE578 hunks replace rlwimi/manual bitfield helper with xDE_b0 = true
raw_diff: grCastle_801CD658 hunk replaces xDE &= ~0x80 with xDE_b0 = false

key_files.role: Changed grCastle_GroundVars9 field at gp+DE from raw u8 xDE to bitfield u8 xDE_b0 : 1 with bit-offset comment.
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: src/melee/gr/types.h added 12 deleted 12 hunks 1
raw_diff: grCastle_GroundVars9 replaces /* +1A gp+DE */ u8 xDE with /* +1A:0 gp+DE:0 */ u8 xDE_b0 : 1
issue_comment ribbanya: 'The struct just needed to be modified to use a bitfield.'

what_changed.text: grCastle_801CE19C was converted from generated-looking C with a tmp Ground pointer, PAD_STACK(8), byte shifts, and MWERKS_GEKKO rlwimi assembly into C using GET_GROUND once, PAD_STACK(4), xDE_b0 flag access, timer decrement, and grCastle_801CD4D0(grCastle_801CE054(gobj) + 8).
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grCastle_801CE19C hunk
human_pr_text: author says this replaces a small bit of ASM with equivalent C code

what_changed.text: The castle9 xDE flag representation changed from raw u8 xDE to a one-bit bitfield xDE_b0 in grCastle_GroundVars9.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: types.h grCastle_GroundVars9 hunk
issue_comment ribbanya: struct needed to be modified to use a bitfield

what_changed.text: Adjacent xDE flag set/clear sites in grCastle_801CD658, grCastle_801CDFD8, and grCastle_801CE578 were cleaned up to assign xDE_b0 directly.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grCastle_801CD658 hunk
raw_diff: grCastle_801CDFD8 hunk
raw_diff: grCastle_801CE578 hunk

what_changed.text: The PR body claims generated bytes matched 100%, but the loaded automated report excerpt lists unrelated gm unit changes and one gmopening .sdata2 regression, so no independent grCastle objdiff line is present in the slice.

smart_moves.text: Modeled the flag byte as a real struct bitfield, allowing direct boolean assignments and eliminating inline rlwimi assembly.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: types.h xDE to xDE_b0 bitfield
raw_diff: grCastle_801CDFD8 removes MWERKS_GEKKO rlwimi block
issue_comment ribbanya: struct needed bitfield

smart_moves.text: Kept the field name conservative as xDE_b0 rather than promoting the author's speculative meaning such as armed, pending, or active.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: field name xDE_b0
human_pr_text: author presents semantic interpretation as GPT guess

smart_moves.text: Updated multiple users of the same flag representation in the same PR, avoiding mixed raw-byte and bitfield access patterns in grCastle castle9 code.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grCastle_801CD658, grCastle_801CDFD8, grCastle_801CE19C, grCastle_801CE578 all use xDE_b0

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a byte is only being manipulated through one-bit set, clear, and test operations, a correctly placed C bitfield can replace shifts, masks, register temporaries, and inline rlwimi assembly.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: xDE >> 7 & 1 replaced by xDE_b0
raw_diff: rlwimi set/clear blocks removed
issue_comment ribbanya: struct needed to be modified to use a bitfield

decomp_lessons.lesson: Do not turn speculative behavior descriptions into semantic field names without stronger evidence; this PR retained an offset/bit-style field name even though the body speculated about an armed or pending flag.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: xDE_b0 name
human_pr_text: 'armed / pending / active' described as best guess from GPT

naming_conventions.name: xDE_b0
naming_conventions.convention: Use offset-plus-bit naming for a recovered bitfield when the bit position is known but semantic meaning remains unproven.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: /* +1A:0 gp+DE:0 */ u8 xDE_b0 : 1
human_pr_text: semantic meaning is presented as a guess

naming_conventions.name: timer
naming_conventions.convention: A local named timer was used for the s16 countdown value xD4 in grCastle_801CE19C.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: s16 timer = gp->gv.castle9.xD4
human_pr_text: xD4 described as signed countdown timer

raw_diff: grCastle_801CE19C removes asm { rlwimi byte, zero, 7, 24, 24 }

raw_diff: grCastle_801CE578 adds PAD_STACK(4)

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Remove extra tmp/register locals when a direct typed access produces the desired code shape.

The PR body claims generated bytes match 100%, but the loaded automated report does not show a grCastle-specific objdiff line and includes unrelated gm item changes plus one unrelated-looking .sdata2 regression.
The author's functional explanation of grCastle_801CE19C is explicitly speculative and AI-assisted; it should not be promoted as established semantics.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Use bitfields for proven flag-byte bits instead of inline rlwimi or masks
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2543 shows a castle GroundVars byte at gp+DE converted from raw u8 xDE plus shift/mask/rlwimi operations into u8 xDE_b0 : 1. This allowed grCastle_801CE19C and nearby functions to use direct boolean assignments and tests.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: types.h grCastle_GroundVars9 xDE_b0
raw_diff: grCastle_801CE19C removes rlwimi clear and xDE >> 7 test
issue_comment ribbanya: struct needed bitfield

accepted_candidate_records.title: Prefer offset-bit names when semantics are only guessed
accepted_candidate_records.text: Although the PR body speculated that the flag might mean armed, pending, or active, the merged code used xDE_b0, preserving known offset/bit information without inventing semantic meaning.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: xDE_b0 field name
human_pr_text: semantic interpretation framed as best guess

source_update_candidates.title: Bitfields as typed replacements for proven flag-byte assembly
source_update_candidates.text: Consider adding an explicit note that when review or diff evidence proves a byte access is a single flag bit, a struct bitfield may be preferable to raw masks, shifts, M2C-style byte access, or inline rlwimi blocks.
evidence_refs: issue_comment ribbanya: struct needed to be modified to use a bitfield
raw_diff: grCastle_801CDFD8 and grCastle_801CE19C remove rlwimi assembly in favor of xDE_b0
source_update_candidates.reason: The existing standards cover typed fields and avoiding inline assembly; this PR provides a concrete bitfield-specific example for curator review.

source_update_candidates.title: grCastle_GroundVars9 gp+DE bit 0 modeled as xDE_b0
source_update_candidates.text: In PR #2543, src/melee/gr/types.h changed grCastle_GroundVars9 at /* +1A:0 gp+DE:0 */ to u8 xDE_b0 : 1, and src/melee/gr/grcastle.c uses it in grCastle_801CD658, grCastle_801CDFD8, grCastle_801CE19C, and grCastle_801CE578.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: types.h grCastle_GroundVars9 hunk
raw_diff: grcastle.c xDE_b0 hunks
source_update_candidates.reason: Potential path-specific fact about castle GroundVars layout; curator should verify against current source before adding.

rejection_notes.text: Do not promote the guessed meaning of grCastle_801CE19C as a one-shot/timer-driven object spawner or state-transition handler; the PR body frames it as an AI-assisted best guess.
